name: the-synod
description: Workspace and tooling baseline for The Synod

scripts.lint: npm run lint:docs && npm run lint:js && npm run typecheck
scripts.typecheck: tsc --noEmit -p services/api/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p services/bridge/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p sdk/js-client/tsconfig.json
